scripts.dev: npm run build -w microservices/knowledgebase-agent/frontend && concurrently -n server,kb,ui -c blue,magenta,green "cargo run -p dashboard-server" "KB_STATIC_DIR=microservices/knowledgebase-agent/frontend/dist cargo run -p knowledgebase-agent" "npm run dev -w frontend/dashboard"
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build -w frontend/dashboard && npm run build -w microservices/knowledgebase-agent/frontend && npm run build -w microservices/watcher-agent/frontend
